mck_info.longBusinessSummary: Construction Joint Stock Company 47 engages in the construction of irrigation, hydroelectric works, transportation roads, civil engineering works, and industrial works in Vietnam. The company is also engaged in exploiting and transporting construction materials; laboratory testing on concrete mechanical durability; heavy maintenance vehicles and construction machineries business; producing and restoring mechanical spare parts; producing mechanical products; operating hotels and restaurants, as well as providing wines, cigarettes, and massage services; providing travel center and other tourist services; operating as an agent of alcohol, including beer, as well as other beverages; providing foreign exchange services; and art and handcraft goods business. In addition, it organizes events, seminars, and meetings, as well as provides adverting services; operates as an agent of airplanes, as well as provides train ticketing services; provides overseas study consultant services; provides transportation of travelers and passengers under contract; offers car rental services; provides recreations, and sports and games on the sea services; offers labor export services; provides vocational training activities; provides real-estate for rent and business; and constructs treatment grouting for foundation and body structure works, as well as internet service. The Company was founded in 1975 and is based in Quy Nhon, Vietnam.
